task: Find everything relevant to the proposed Futurama direction for experiments/lua_interpreter_vm: a stencil-only VM where Lalin remains the VM/interpreter authoring language, L0/L1 are saturated stencil floors/atoms, SponJIT becomes the stencil infrastructure, C stencils may remain only as conforming native stencil bodies/helpers, and FFI/runtime calls become stencils. Gather current files, architecture docs, code boundaries, existing prototype materializer/interpreter pieces, tests, and any tensions or implementation constraints. Do not propose solutions; collect facts and map the terrain.
pane: pi-wf-futurama-stencil-vm-scout:0.0 (detached; attach with: tmux attach -t pi-wf-futurama-stencil-vm-scout)
